name: Amgen Inc.
description: Amgen Inc. is a global biotechnology company that discovers, develops, manufactures, and delivers innovative human therapeutics. A pioneer in the biotechnology industry since 1980, Amgen focuses on areas of high unmet medical need and leverages its expertise to strive for solutions that improve health outcomes and dramatically improve people's lives. The company's medicines treat serious illnesses, primarily in oncology, hematology, cardiovascular disease, inflammation, bone health, and nephrology.
